    3575              : generated_when:
    3576            0 :                         ALWAYS                  { $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_ALWAYS; }
    3577            1 :                         | BY DEFAULT    { $$ = ATTRIBUTE_IDENTITY_BY_DEFAULT; }
    3578              :                 ;
    3579              : 
    3580              : /*
    3581              :  * ConstraintAttr represents constraint attributes, which we parse as if
    3582              :  * they were independent constraint clauses, in order to avoid shift/reduce
    3583              :  * conflicts (since NOT might start either an independent NOT NULL clause
    3584              :  * or an attribute).  parse_utilcmd.c is responsible for attaching the
    3585              :  * attribute information to the preceding "real" constraint node, and for
    3586              :  * complaining if attribute clauses appear in the wrong place or wrong
    3587              :  * combinations.
    3588              :  *
    3589              :  * See also ConstraintAttributeSpec, which can be used in places where
    3590              :  * there is no parsing conflict.  (Note: currently, NOT VALID and NO INHERIT
    3591              :  * are allowed clauses in ConstraintAttributeSpec, but not here.  Someday we
    3592              :  * might need to allow them here too, but for the moment it doesn't seem
    3593              :  * useful in the statements that use ConstraintAttr.)
    3594              :  */
    3595              : ConstraintAttr:
    3596              :                         DEFERRABLE
    3597              :                                 {
    3598            0 :                                         Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
    3599            0 :                                         n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRABLE;
    3600            0 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3601            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    3602              :                                 }
    3603              :                         | NOT DEFERRABLE
    3604              :                                 {
    3605            0 :                                         Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
    3606            0 :                                         n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_NOT_DEFERRABLE;
    3607            0 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3608            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    3609              :                                 }
    3610              :                         | INITIALLY DEFERRED
    3611              :                                 {
    3612            0 :                                         Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
    3613            0 :                                         n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_DEFERRED;
    3614            0 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3615            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    3616              :                                 }
    3617              :                         | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE
    3618              :                                 {
    3619            0 :                                         Constraint *n = makeNode(Constraint);
    3620            0 :                                         n->contype = CONSTR_ATTR_IMMEDIATE;
    3621            0 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3622            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    3623              :                                 }

    3855              : 
    3856              : /*
    3857              :  * We combine the update and delete actions into one value temporarily
    3858              :  * for simplicity of parsing, and then break them down again in the
    3859              :  * calling production.  update is in the left 8 bits, delete in the right.
    3860              :  * Note that NOACTION is the default.
    3861              :  */
    3862              : key_actions:
    3863              :                         key_update
    3864            0 :                                 { $$ = ($1 << 8) | (FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION & 0xFF); }
    3865              :                         | key_delete
    3866            0 :                                 { $$ = (FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION << 8) | ($1 & 0xFF); }
    3867              :                         | key_update key_delete
    3868            0 :                                 { $$ = ($1 << 8) | ($2 & 0xFF); }
    3869              :                         | key_delete key_update
    3870            0 :                                 { $$ = ($2 << 8) | ($1 & 0xFF); }
    3871              :                         | /*EMPTY*/
    3872           17 :                                 { $$ = (FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION << 8) | (FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION & 0xFF); }
    3873              :                 ;
    3874              : 
    3875            0 : key_update: ON UPDATE key_action                { $$ = $3; }
    3876              :                 ;
    3877              : 
    3878            0 : key_delete: ON DELETE_P key_action              { $$ = $3; }
    3879              :                 ;
    3880              : 
    3881              : key_action:
    3882            0 :                         NO ACTION                                       { $$ = FKCONSTR_ACTION_NOACTION; }
    3883            0 :                         | RESTRICT                                      { $$ = FKCONSTR_ACTION_RESTRICT; }
    3884            0 :                         | CASCADE                                       { $$ = FKCONSTR_ACTION_CASCADE; }
    3885            0 :                         | SET NULL_P                            { $$ = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETNULL; }
    3886            0 :                         | SET DEFAULT                           { $$ = FKCONSTR_ACTION_SETDEFAULT; }
    3887              :                 ;
    3888              : 
    3889            0 : OptInherit: INHERITS '(' qualified_name_list ')'        { $$ = $3; }
    3890          129 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NIL; }
    3891              :                 ;
    3892              : 
    3893              : /* Optional partition key specification */
    3894           21 : OptPartitionSpec: PartitionSpec { $$ = $1; }
    3895          126 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                     { $$ = NULL; }
    3896              :                 ;
    3897              : 
    3898              : PartitionSpec: PARTITION BY ColId '(' part_params ')'
    3899              :                                 {
    3900           21 :                                         PartitionSpec *n = makeNode(PartitionSpec);
    3901              : 
    3902           21 :                                         n->strategy = $3;
    3903           21 :                                         n->partParams = $5;
    3904           21 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3905              : 
    3906           21 :                                         $$ = n;
    3907              :                                 }
    3908              :                 ;
    3909              : 
    3910           21 : part_params:    part_elem                                               { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    3911            0 :                         | part_params ',' part_elem                     { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    3912              :                 ;
    3913              : 
    3914              : part_elem: ColId opt_collate opt_class
    3915              :                                 {
    3916           21 :                                         PartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);
    3917              : 
    3918           21 :                                         n->name = $1;
    3919           21 :                                         n->expr = NULL;
    3920           21 :                                         n->collation = $2;
    3921           21 :                                         n->opclass = $3;
    3922           21 :                                         n->location = @1;
    3923           21 :                                         $$ = n;
    3924              :                                 }
    3925              :                         | func_expr_windowless opt_collate opt_class
    3926              :                                 {
    3927            0 :                                         PartitionElem *n = makeNode(PartitionElem);
    3928              : 
    3929            0 :                                         n->name = NULL;
    3930            0 :                                         n->expr = $1;

    3932            0 :                                         n->opclass = $3;
    3933            0 :                                         n->location = @1;

    3935              :                                 }

    3939              :

    3941            0 :                                         n->expr = $2;
    3942            0 :                                         n->collation = $4;
    3943            0 :                                         n->opclass = $5;

    3978              : /*****************************************************************************
    3979              :  *
    3980              :  *              QUERY :
    3981              :  *                              CREATE STATISTICS [IF NOT EXISTS] stats_name [(stat types)]
    3982              :  *                                      ON expression-list FROM from_list
    3983              :  *
    3984              :  * Note: the expectation here is that the clauses after ON are a subset of
    3985              :  * SELECT syntax, allowing for expressions and joined tables, and probably
    3986              :  * someday a WHERE clause.  Much less than that is currently implemented,
    3987              :  * but the grammar accepts it and then we'll throw FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED
    3988              :  * errors as necessary at execution.
    3989              :  *
    3990              :  *****************************************************************************/
    3991              : 
    3992              : CreateStatsStmt:
    3993              :                         CREATE STATISTICS any_name

    3997            0 :                                         n->defnames = $3;
    3998            0 :                                         n->stat_types = $4;
    3999            0 :                                         n->exprs = $6;
    4000            0 :                                         n->relations = $8;
    4001            0 :                                         n->stxcomment = NULL;
    4002            0 :                                         n->if_not_exists = false;
    4003            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    4004              :                                 }

    4012            0 :                                         n->relations = $11;
    4013            0 :                                         n->stxcomment = NULL;
    4014            0 :                                         n->if_not_exists = true;
    4015            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    4016              :                                 }

    4324              : 
    4325              : /*****************************************************************************
    4326              :  *
    4327              :  *              QUERIES :
    4328              :  *                              CREATE [OR REPLACE] [TRUSTED] [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...
    4329              :  *                              DROP [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE ...
    4330              :  *
    4331              :  *****************************************************************************/
    4332              : 
    4333              : CreatePLangStmt:
    4334              :                         CREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE NonReservedWord_or_Sconst
    4335              :                         {
    4336              :                                 /*
    4337              :                                  * We now interpret parameterless CREATE LANGUAGE as
    4338              :                                  * CREATE EXTENSION.  "OR REPLACE" is silently translated
    4339              :                                  * to "IF NOT EXISTS", which isn't quite the same, but
    4340              :                                  * seems more useful than throwing an error.  We just
    4341              :                                  * ignore TRUSTED, as the previous code would have too.
    4342              :                                  */
    4343            0 :                                 CreateExtensionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateExtensionStmt);
    4344            0 :                                 n->if_not_exists = $2;
    4345            0 :                                 n->extname = $6;
    4346            0 :                                 n->options = NIL;
    4347            0 :                                 $$ = (Node *)n;
    4348              :                         }
    4349              :                         | CREATE opt_or_replace opt_trusted opt_procedural LANGUAGE NonReservedWord_or_Sconst
    4350              :                           HANDLER handler_name opt_inline_handler opt_validator
    4351              :                         {
    4352            1 :                                 CreatePLangStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePLangStmt);
    4353            1 :                                 n->replace = $2;
    4354            1 :                                 n->plname = $6;
    4355            1 :                                 n->plhandler = $8;
    4356            1 :                                 n->plinline = $9;
    4357            1 :                                 n->plvalidator = $10;
    4358            1 :                                 n->pltrusted = $3;
    4359            1 :                                 $$ = (Node *)n;
    4360              :                         }
    4361              :                 ;
    4362              : 
    4363              : opt_trusted:
    4364            1 :                         TRUSTED                                                                 { $$ = true; }
    4365            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = false; }
    4366              :                 ;
    4367              : 
    4368              : /* This ought to be just func_name, but that causes reduce/reduce conflicts
    4369              :  * (CREATE LANGUAGE is the only place where func_name isn't followed by '(').
    4370              :  * Work around by using simple names, instead.
    4371              :  */
    4372              : handler_name:
    4373            3 :                         name                                            { $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
    4374            0 :                         | name attrs                            { $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }
    4375              :                 ;
    4376              : 
    4377              : opt_inline_handler:
    4378            1 :                         INLINE_P handler_name                                   { $$ = $2; }
    4379            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NIL; }
    4380              :                 ;
    4381              : 
    4382              : validator_clause:
    4383            1 :                         VALIDATOR handler_name                                  { $$ = $2; }
    4384            0 :                         | NO VALIDATOR                                                  { $$ = NIL; }
    4385              :                 ;
    4386              : 
    4387              : opt_validator:
    4388            1 :                         validator_clause                                                { $$ = $1; }
    4389            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NIL; }
    4390              :                 ;

    4820              : CreateFdwStmt: CREATE FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER name opt_fdw_options create_generic_options

    4823            0 :                                         n->fdwname = $5;
    4824            0 :                                         n->func_options = $6;
    4825            0 :                                         n->options = $7;
    4826            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;

    4830              : fdw_option:
    4831            0 :                         HANDLER handler_name                            { $$ = makeDefElem("handler", (Node *)$2, @1); }
    4832            0 :                         | NO HANDLER                                            { $$ = makeDefElem("handler", NULL, @1); }
    4833            0 :                         | VALIDATOR handler_name                        { $$ = makeDefElem("validator", (Node *)$2, @1); }
    4834            0 :                         | NO VALIDATOR                                          { $$ = makeDefElem("validator", NULL, @1); }
    4835              :                 ;
    4836              : 
    4837              : fdw_options:
    4838            0 :                         fdw_option                                                      { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    4839            0 :                         | fdw_options fdw_option                        { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
    4840              :                 ;
    4841              : 
    4842              : opt_fdw_options:

    4872              : /* Options definition for CREATE FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */
    4873              : create_generic_options:

    4875          210 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                                     { $$ = NIL; }
    4876              :                 ;
    4877              : 
    4878              : generic_option_list:
    4879              :                         generic_option_elem

    4882              :                                 }

    4884              :                                 {
    4885            0 :                                         $$ = lappend($1, $3);
    4886              :                                 }
    4887              :                 ;
    4888              : 
    4889              : /* Options definition for ALTER FDW, SERVER and USER MAPPING */
    4890              : alter_generic_options:

    4895              :                         alter_generic_option_elem

    4898              :                                 }

    4910              :                         | SET generic_option_elem

    4914              :                                 }
    4915              :                         | ADD_P generic_option_elem

    4917            0 :                                         $$ = $2;

    4919              :                                 }
    4920              :                         | DROP generic_option_name
    4921              :                                 {

    4924              :                 ;

    5144              : /*****************************************************************************

    5146              :  *              QUERY:

    5149              :  *                              FROM SERVER server_name INTO local_schema [ OPTIONS (...) ]
    5150              :  *

    5157            0 :                                 ImportForeignSchemaStmt *n = makeNode(ImportForeignSchemaStmt);
    5158            0 :                                 n->server_name = $8;
    5159            0 :                                 n->remote_schema = $4;

    5161            0 :                                 n->list_type = $5->type;
    5162            0 :                                 n->table_list = $5->table_names;
    5163            0 :                                 n->options = $11;
    5164            0 :                                 $$ = (Node *) n;
    5165              :                         }
    5166              :                 ;
    5167              : 
    5168              : import_qualification_type:
    5169            0 :                 LIMIT TO                                { $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_LIMIT_TO; }
    5170            0 :                 | EXCEPT                                { $$ = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_EXCEPT; }
    5171              :                 ;
    5172              : 
    5173              : import_qualification:
    5174              :                 import_qualification_type '(' relation_expr_list ')'

    5177            0 :                                 n->type = $1;
    5178            0 :                                 n->table_names = $3;
    5179            0 :                                 $$ = n;
    5180              :                         }
    5181              :                 | /*EMPTY*/
    5182              :                         {

    5184            0 :                                 n->type = FDW_IMPORT_SCHEMA_ALL;
    5185            0 :                                 n->table_names = NIL;
    5186            0 :                                 $$ = n;
    5187              :                         }
    5188              :                 ;

    5323              :                 ;
    5324              : 
    5325              : RowSecurityOptionalToRole:
    5326            0 :                         TO role_list                    { $$ = $2; }
    5327            0 :                         | /* EMPTY */                   { $$ = NULL; }
    5328              :                 ;
    5329              : 
    5330              : RowSecurityDefaultPermissive:
    5331              :                         AS IDENT
    5332              :                                 {
    5333            0 :                                         if (strcmp($2, "permissive") == 0)
    5334            0 :                                                 $$ = true;
    5335            0 :                                         else if (strcmp($2, "restrictive") == 0)
    5336            0 :                                                 $$ = false;
    5337              :                                         else
    5338            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
    5339              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
    5340              :                                                          errmsg("unrecognized row security option \"%s\"", $2),
    5341              :                                                                  errhint("Only PERMISSIVE or RESTRICTIVE policies are supported currently."),
    5342              :                                                                          parser_errposition(@2)));
    5343              : 
    5344              :                                 }
    5345            0 :                         | /* EMPTY */                   { $$ = true; }
    5346              :                 ;
    5347              : 
    5348              : RowSecurityDefaultForCmd:
    5349            0 :                         FOR row_security_cmd    { $$ = $2; }
    5350            0 :                         | /* EMPTY */                   { $$ = "all"; }
    5351              :                 ;
    5352              :

    5354            0 :                         ALL                             { $$ = "all"; }
    5355            0 :                 |       SELECT                  { $$ = "select"; }
    5356            0 :                 |       INSERT                  { $$ = "insert"; }
    5357            0 :                 |       UPDATE                  { $$ = "update"; }
    5358            0 :                 |       DELETE_P                { $$ = "delete"; }

    5390              : CreateTrigStmt:
    5391              :                         CREATE TRIGGER name TriggerActionTime TriggerEvents ON
    5392              :                         qualified_name TriggerReferencing TriggerForSpec TriggerWhen
    5393              :                         EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'
    5394              :                                 {
    5395            0 :                                         CreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);
    5396            0 :                                         n->trigname = $3;
    5397            0 :                                         n->relation = $7;
    5398            0 :                                         n->funcname = $13;
    5399            0 :                                         n->args = $15;
    5400            0 :                                         n->row = $9;
    5401            0 :                                         n->timing = $4;
    5402            0 :                                         n->events = intVal(linitial($5));
    5403            0 :                                         n->columns = (List *) lsecond($5);
    5404            0 :                                         n->whenClause = $10;
    5405            0 :                                         n->transitionRels = $8;
    5406            0 :                                         n->isconstraint  = false;
    5407            0 :                                         n->deferrable         = false;
    5408            0 :                                         n->initdeferred  = false;
    5409            0 :                                         n->constrrel = NULL;
    5410            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    5411              :                                 }
    5412              :                         | CREATE CONSTRAINT TRIGGER name AFTER TriggerEvents ON
    5413              :                         qualified_name OptConstrFromTable ConstraintAttributeSpec
    5414              :                         FOR EACH ROW TriggerWhen
    5415              :                         EXECUTE FUNCTION_or_PROCEDURE func_name '(' TriggerFuncArgs ')'
    5416              :                                 {
    5417            0 :                                         CreateTrigStmt *n = makeNode(CreateTrigStmt);
    5418            0 :                                         n->trigname = $4;
    5419            0 :                                         n->relation = $8;
    5420            0 :                                         n->funcname = $17;
    5421            0 :                                         n->args = $19;
    5422            0 :                                         n->row = true;
    5423            0 :                                         n->timing = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER;
    5424            0 :                                         n->events = intVal(linitial($6));
    5425            0 :                                         n->columns = (List *) lsecond($6);
    5426            0 :                                         n->whenClause = $14;
    5427            0 :                                         n->transitionRels = NIL;
    5428            0 :                                         n->isconstraint  = true;
    5429            0 :                                         processCASbits($10, @10, "TRIGGER",
    5430              :                                                                    &n->deferrable, &n->initdeferred, NULL,
    5431              :                                                                    NULL, yyscanner);
    5432            0 :                                         n->constrrel = $9;
    5433            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    5434              :                                 }
    5435              :                 ;
    5436              : 
    5437              : TriggerActionTime:
    5438            0 :                         BEFORE                                                          { $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_BEFORE; }
    5439            0 :                         | AFTER                                                         { $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_AFTER; }
    5440            0 :                         | INSTEAD OF                                            { $$ = TRIGGER_TYPE_INSTEAD; }
    5441              :                 ;
    5442              : 
    5443              : TriggerEvents:
    5444              :                         TriggerOneEvent
    5445            0 :                                 { $$ = $1; }
    5446              :                         | TriggerEvents OR TriggerOneEvent
    5447              :                                 {
    5448            0 :                                         int             events1 = intVal(linitial($1));
    5449            0 :                                         int             events2 = intVal(linitial($3));
    5450            0 :                                         List   *columns1 = (List *) lsecond($1);
    5451            0 :                                         List   *columns2 = (List *) lsecond($3);
    5452              : 
    5453            0 :                                         if (events1 & events2)
    5454            0 :                                                 parser_yyerror("duplicate trigger events specified");
    5455              :                                         /*
    5456              :                                          * concat'ing the columns lists loses information about
    5457              :                                          * which columns went with which event, but so long as
    5458              :                                          * only UPDATE carries columns and we disallow multiple
    5459              :                                          * UPDATE items, it doesn't matter.  Command execution
    5460              :                                          * should just ignore the columns for non-UPDATE events.
    5461              :                                          */
    5462            0 :                                         $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(events1 | events2),
    5463              :                                                                         list_concat(columns1, columns2));
    5464              :                                 }
    5465              :                 ;
    5466              : 
    5467              : TriggerOneEvent:
    5468              :                         INSERT
    5469            0 :                                 { $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_INSERT), NIL); }
    5470              :                         | DELETE_P
    5471            0 :                                 { $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_DELETE), NIL); }
    5472              :                         | UPDATE
    5473            0 :                                 { $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), NIL); }
    5474              :                         | UPDATE OF columnList
    5475            0 :                                 { $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_UPDATE), $3); }
    5476              :                         | TRUNCATE
    5477            0 :                                 { $$ = list_make2(makeInteger(TRIGGER_TYPE_TRUNCATE), NIL); }
    5478              :                 ;
    5479              : 
    5480              : TriggerReferencing:
    5481            0 :                         REFERENCING TriggerTransitions                  { $$ = $2; }
    5482            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NIL; }
    5483              :                 ;
    5484              : 
    5485              : TriggerTransitions:
    5486            0 :                         TriggerTransition                                               { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    5487            0 :                         | TriggerTransitions TriggerTransition  { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
    5488              :                 ;
    5489              : 
    5490              : TriggerTransition:
    5491              :                         TransitionOldOrNew TransitionRowOrTable opt_as TransitionRelName
    5492              :                                 {
    5493            0 :                                         TriggerTransition *n = makeNode(TriggerTransition);
    5494            0 :                                         n->name = $4;
    5495            0 :                                         n->isNew = $1;
    5496            0 :                                         n->isTable = $2;
    5497            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    5498              :                                 }
    5499              :                 ;
    5500              : 
    5501              : TransitionOldOrNew:
    5502            0 :                         NEW                                                                             { $$ = true; }
    5503            0 :                         | OLD                                                                   { $$ = false; }
    5504              :                 ;
    5505              : 
    5506              : TransitionRowOrTable:
    5507            0 :                         TABLE                                                                   { $$ = true; }
    5508              :                         /*
    5509              :                          * According to the standard, lack of a keyword here implies ROW.
    5510              :                          * Support for that would require prohibiting ROW entirely here,
    5511              :                          * reserving the keyword ROW, and/or requiring AS (instead of
    5512              :                          * allowing it to be optional, as the standard specifies) as the
    5513              :                          * next token.  Requiring ROW seems cleanest and easiest to
    5514              :                          * explain.
    5515              :                          */
    5516            0 :                         | ROW                                                                   { $$ = false; }
    5517              :                 ;
    5518              : 
    5519              : TransitionRelName:
    5520            0 :                         ColId                                                                   { $$ = $1; }
    5521              :                 ;
    5522              : 
    5523              : TriggerForSpec:
    5524              :                         FOR TriggerForOptEach TriggerForType
    5525              :                                 {
    5526            0 :                                         $$ = $3;
    5527              :                                 }
    5528              :                         | /* EMPTY */
    5529              :                                 {
    5530              :                                         /*
    5531              :                                          * If ROW/STATEMENT not specified, default to
    5532              :                                          * STATEMENT, per SQL
    5533              :                                          */
    5534            0 :                                         $$ = false;
    5535              :                                 }
    5536              :                 ;
    5537              : 
    5538              : TriggerForOptEach:
    5539              :                         EACH                                                                    {}
    5540              :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             {}
    5541              :                 ;
    5542              : 
    5543              : TriggerForType:
    5544            0 :                         ROW                                                                             { $$ = true; }
    5545            0 :                         | STATEMENT                                                             { $$ = false; }
    5546              :                 ;
    5547              : 
    5548              : TriggerWhen:
    5549            0 :                         WHEN '(' a_expr ')'                                             { $$ = $3; }
    5550            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NULL; }
    5551              :                 ;
    5552              :

    5555              :                 |       PROCEDURE

    5557              : 
    5558              : TriggerFuncArgs:

    5560            0 :                         | TriggerFuncArgs ',' TriggerFuncArg    { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    5561            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NIL; }
    5562              :                 ;
    5563              : 
    5564              : TriggerFuncArg:
    5565              :                         Iconst
    5566              :                                 {

    5568              :                                 }
    5569            0 :                         | FCONST                                                                { $$ = makeString($1); }
    5570            0 :                         | Sconst                                                                { $$ = makeString($1); }
    5571            0 :                         | ColLabel                                                              { $$ = makeString($1); }
    5572              :                 ;
    5573              : 
    5574              : OptConstrFromTable:
    5575            0 :                         FROM qualified_name                                             { $$ = $2; }
    5576            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = NULL; }
    5577              :                 ;
    5578              : 
    5579              : ConstraintAttributeSpec:
    5580              :                         /*EMPTY*/
    5581           22 :                                 { $$ = 0; }
    5582              :                         | ConstraintAttributeSpec ConstraintAttributeElem
    5583              :                                 {
    5584              :                                         /*
    5585              :                                          * We must complain about conflicting options.
    5586              :                                          * We could, but choose not to, complain about redundant
    5587              :                                          * options (ie, where $2's bit is already set in $1).
    5588              :                                          */
    5589            3 :                                         int             newspec = $1 | $2;
    5590              : 
    5591              :                                         /* special message for this case */
    5592            3 :                                         if ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED))
    5593            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
    5594              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
    5595              :                                                                  errmsg("constraint declared INITIALLY DEFERRED must be DEFERRABLE"),
    5596              :                                                                  parser_errposition(@2)));
    5597              :                                         /* generic message for other conflicts */
    5598            3 :                                         if ((newspec & (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE)) == (CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE | CAS_DEFERRABLE) ||
    5599            3 :                                                 (newspec & (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED)) == (CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE | CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED))
    5600            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
    5601              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_SYNTAX_ERROR),
    5602              :                                                                  errmsg("conflicting constraint properties"),
    5603              :                                                                  parser_errposition(@2)));
    5604            3 :                                         $$ = newspec;
    5605              :                                 }
    5606              :                 ;
    5607              : 
    5608              : ConstraintAttributeElem:
    5609            0 :                         NOT DEFERRABLE                                  { $$ = CAS_NOT_DEFERRABLE; }
    5610            0 :                         | DEFERRABLE                                    { $$ = CAS_DEFERRABLE; }
    5611            0 :                         | INITIALLY IMMEDIATE                   { $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_IMMEDIATE; }
    5612            0 :                         | INITIALLY DEFERRED                    { $$ = CAS_INITIALLY_DEFERRED; }
    5613            3 :                         | NOT VALID                                             { $$ = CAS_NOT_VALID; }
    5614            0 :                         | NO INHERIT                                    { $$ = CAS_NO_INHERIT; }
    5615              :                 ;

    5899              : /*
    5900              :  * Must use IDENT here to avoid reduce/reduce conflicts; fortunately none of

    5903              :  */
    5904              : old_aggr_elem:  IDENT '=' def_arg
    5905              :                                 {
    5906            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *)$3, @1);

    6074              :                                         /*

    6077              :                                          * dumps.

    6079            0 :                                         ereport(NOTICE,
    6080              :                                                         (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),

    6083              :                                                          parser_errposition(@1)));
    6084            0 :                                         $$ = true;
    6085              :                                 }

    6351              : 
    6352              : /* object types taking any_name_list */
    6353              : drop_type_any_name:
    6354          233 :                         TABLE                                                                   { $$ = OBJECT_TABLE; }
    6355            0 :                         | SEQUENCE                                                              { $$ = OBJECT_SEQUENCE; }
    6356           33 :                         | VIEW                                                                  { $$ = OBJECT_VIEW; }
    6357            6 :                         | MATERIALIZED VIEW                                             { $$ = OBJECT_MATVIEW; }
    6358            3 :                         | INDEX                                                                 { $$ = OBJECT_INDEX; }
    6359            0 :                         | FOREIGN TABLE                                                 { $$ = OBJECT_FOREIGN_TABLE; }
    6360            0 :                         | COLLATION                                                             { $$ = OBJECT_COLLATION; }
    6361            0 :                         | CONVERSION_P                                                  { $$ = OBJECT_CONVERSION; }
    6362            0 :                         | STATISTICS                                                    { $$ = OBJECT_STATISTIC_EXT; }
    6363            0 :                         | TEXT_P SEARCH PARSER                                  { $$ = OBJECT_TSPARSER; }
    6364            0 :                         | TEXT_P SEARCH DICTIONARY                              { $$ = OBJECT_TSDICTIONARY; }

    6372            0 :                         | EVENT TRIGGER                                                 { $$ = OBJECT_EVENT_TRIGGER; }
    6373            0 :                         | EXTENSION                                                             { $$ = OBJECT_EXTENSION; }
    6374            0 :                         | FOREIGN DATA_P WRAPPER                                { $$ = OBJECT_FDW; }

    6380              : /* object types attached to a table */
    6381              : drop_type_name_on_any_name:
    6382            0 :                         POLICY                                                                  { $$ = OBJECT_POLICY; }
    6383            0 :                         | RULE                                                                  { $$ = OBJECT_RULE; }
    6384            0 :                         | TRIGGER                                                               { $$ = OBJECT_TRIGGER; }
    6385              :                 ;
    6386              : 
    6387              : any_name_list:
    6388          342 :                         any_name                                                                { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    6389            1 :                         | any_name_list ',' any_name                    { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    6390              :                 ;
    6391              : 
    6392          522 : any_name:       ColId                                           { $$ = list_make1(makeString($1)); }
    6393            2 :                         | ColId attrs                           { $$ = lcons(makeString($1), $2); }
    6394              :                 ;
    6395              : 
    6396              : attrs:          '.' attr_name
    6397            9 :                                         { $$ = list_make1(makeString($2)); }
    6398              :                         | attrs '.' attr_name
    6399            0 :                                         { $$ = lappend($1, makeString($3)); }
    6400              :                 ;
    6401              : 
    6402              : type_name_list:
    6403            0 :                         Typename                                                                { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    6404            0 :                         | type_name_list ',' Typename                   { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    6405              :                 ;
    6406              : 
    6407              : /*****************************************************************************
    6408              :  *
    6409              :  *              QUERY:
    6410              :  *                              truncate table relname1, relname2, ...
    6411              :  *
    6412              :  *****************************************************************************/
    6413              : 
    6414              : TruncateStmt:
    6415              :                         TRUNCATE opt_table relation_expr_list opt_restart_seqs opt_drop_behavior
    6416              :                                 {
    6417            0 :                                         TruncateStmt *n = makeNode(TruncateStmt);
    6418            0 :                                         n->relations = $3;
    6419            0 :                                         n->restart_seqs = $4;
    6420            0 :                                         n->behavior = $5;
    6421            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    6422              :                                 }
    6423              :                 ;
    6424              : 
    6425              : opt_restart_seqs:
    6426            0 :                         CONTINUE_P IDENTITY_P           { $$ = false; }
    6427            0 :                         | RESTART IDENTITY_P            { $$ = true; }
    6428            0 :                         | /* EMPTY */                           { $$ = false; }
    6429              :                 ;
    6430              : 
    6431              : /*****************************************************************************
    6432              :  *
    6433              :  *      The COMMENT ON statement can take different forms based upon the type of
    6434              :  *      the object associated with the comment. The form of the statement is:
    6435              :  *
    6436              :  *      COMMENT ON [ [ ACCESS METHOD | CONVERSION | COLLATION |
    6437              :  *                 DATABASE | DOMAIN |
    6438              :  *                 EXTENSION | EVENT TRIGGER | FOREIGN DATA WRAPPER |
    6439              :  *                 FOREIGN TABLE | INDEX | [PROCEDURAL] LANGUAGE |
    6440              :  *                 MATERIALIZED VIEW | POLICY | ROLE | SCHEMA | SEQUENCE |
    6441              :  *                 SERVER | STATISTICS | TABLE | TABLESPACE |
    6442              :  *                 TEXT SEARCH CONFIGURATION | TEXT SEARCH DICTIONARY |
    6443              :  *                 TEXT SEARCH PARSER | TEXT SEARCH TEMPLATE | TYPE |
    6444              :  *                 VIEW] <objname> |
    6445              :  *                               AGGREGATE <aggname> (arg1, ...) |
    6446              :  *                               CAST (<src type> AS <dst type>) |
    6447              :  *                               COLUMN <relname>.<colname> |
    6448              :  *                               CONSTRAINT <constraintname> ON <relname> |
    6449              :  *                               CONSTRAINT <constraintname> ON DOMAIN <domainname> |
    6450              :  *                               FUNCTION <funcname> (arg1, arg2, ...) |
    6451              :  *                               LARGE OBJECT <oid> |
    6452              :  *                               OPERATOR <op> (leftoperand_typ, rightoperand_typ) |
    6453              :  *                               OPERATOR CLASS <name> USING <access-method> |
    6454              :  *                               OPERATOR FAMILY <name> USING <access-method> |
    6455              :  *                               RULE <rulename> ON <relname> |
    6456              :  *                               TRIGGER <triggername> ON <relname> ]
    6457              :  *                         IS { 'text' | NULL }
    6458              :  *
    6459              :  *****************************************************************************/
    6460              : 
    6461              : CommentStmt:
    6462              :                         COMMENT ON comment_type_any_name any_name IS comment_text
    6463              :                                 {
    6464           45 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6465           45 :                                         n->objtype = $3;
    6466           45 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6467           45 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6468           45 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6469              :                                 }
    6470              :                         | COMMENT ON comment_type_name name IS comment_text
    6471              :                                 {
    6472            3 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6473            3 :                                         n->objtype = $3;
    6474            3 :                                         n->object = (Node *) makeString($4);
    6475            3 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6476            3 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6477              :                                 }
    6478              :                         | COMMENT ON TYPE_P Typename IS comment_text
    6479              :                                 {
    6480            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6481            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_TYPE;
    6482            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6483            0 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6484            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6485              :                                 }
    6486              :                         | COMMENT ON DOMAIN_P Typename IS comment_text
    6487              :                                 {
    6488            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6489            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMAIN;
    6490            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6491            0 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6492            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6493              :                                 }
    6494              :                         | COMMENT ON AGGREGATE aggregate_with_argtypes IS comment_text
    6495              :                                 {
    6496            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6497            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_AGGREGATE;
    6498            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6499            0 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6500            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6501              :                                 }
    6502              :                         | COMMENT ON FUNCTION function_with_argtypes IS comment_text
    6503              :                                 {
    6504            2 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6505            2 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
    6506            2 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6507            2 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6508            2 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6509              :                                 }
    6510              :                         | COMMENT ON OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes IS comment_text
    6511              :                                 {
    6512            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6513            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_OPERATOR;
    6514            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $4;
    6515            0 :                                         n->comment = $6;
    6516            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;

    6519              :                                 {

    6522            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));
    6523            0 :                                         n->comment = $8;
    6524            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6525              :                                 }
    6526              :                         | COMMENT ON CONSTRAINT name ON DOMAIN_P any_name IS comment_text
    6527              :                                 {
    6528            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6529            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_DOMCONSTRAINT;
    6530              :                                         /*
    6531              :                                          * should use Typename not any_name in the production, but
    6532              :                                          * there's a shift/reduce conflict if we do that, so fix it
    6533              :                                          * up here.
    6534              :                                          */
    6535            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) list_make2(makeTypeNameFromNameList($7), makeString($4));
    6536            0 :                                         n->comment = $9;
    6537            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6538              :                                 }
    6539              :                         | COMMENT ON POLICY name ON any_name IS comment_text
    6540              :                                 {
    6541            0 :                                         CommentStmt *n = makeNode(CommentStmt);
    6542            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_POLICY;
    6543            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));

    6567            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) lappend($6, makeString($4));
    6568            0 :                                         n->comment = $8;

    6570              :                                 }

    6655              : comment_text:

    6659              : 
    6660              : 
    6661              : /*****************************************************************************
    6662              :  *
    6663              :  *  SECURITY LABEL [FOR <provider>] ON <object> IS <label>
    6664              :  *
    6665              :  *  As with COMMENT ON, <object> can refer to various types of database
    6666              :  *  objects (e.g. TABLE, COLUMN, etc.).
    6667              :  *
    6668              :  *****************************************************************************/
    6669              : 
    6670              : SecLabelStmt:
    6671              :                         SECURITY LABEL opt_provider ON security_label_type_any_name any_name
    6672              :                         IS security_label
    6673              :                                 {
    6674            0 :                                         SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
    6675            0 :                                         n->provider = $3;
    6676            0 :                                         n->objtype = $5;
    6677            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) $6;
    6678            0 :                                         n->label = $8;
    6679            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6680              :                                 }

    6682              :                           IS security_label

    6684            0 :                                         SecLabelStmt *n = makeNode(SecLabelStmt);
    6685            0 :                                         n->provider = $3;

    6688            0 :                                         n->label = $8;
    6689            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    6690              :                                 }

    6951              : 
    6952              : 
    6953              : /*****************************************************************************
    6954              :  *
    6955              :  * GRANT and REVOKE statements
    6956              :  *
    6957              :  *****************************************************************************/
    6958              : 
    6959              : GrantStmt:      GRANT privileges ON privilege_target TO grantee_list
    6960              :                         opt_grant_grant_option
    6961              :                                 {
    6962           68 :                                         GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
    6963           68 :                                         n->is_grant = true;
    6964           68 :                                         n->privileges = $2;
    6965           68 :                                         n->targtype = ($4)->targtype;
    6966           68 :                                         n->objtype = ($4)->objtype;
    6967           68 :                                         n->objects = ($4)->objs;
    6968           68 :                                         n->grantees = $6;
    6969           68 :                                         n->grant_option = $7;
    6970           68 :                                         $$ = (Node*)n;
    6971              :                                 }
    6972              :                 ;
    6973              : 
    6974              : RevokeStmt:
    6975              :                         REVOKE privileges ON privilege_target
    6976              :                         FROM grantee_list opt_drop_behavior
    6977              :                                 {
    6978           53 :                                         GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
    6979           53 :                                         n->is_grant = false;
    6980           53 :                                         n->grant_option = false;
    6981           53 :                                         n->privileges = $2;
    6982           53 :                                         n->targtype = ($4)->targtype;
    6983           53 :                                         n->objtype = ($4)->objtype;
    6984           53 :                                         n->objects = ($4)->objs;
    6985           53 :                                         n->grantees = $6;
    6986           53 :                                         n->behavior = $7;
    6987           53 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    6988              :                                 }
    6989              :                         | REVOKE GRANT OPTION FOR privileges ON privilege_target
    6990              :                         FROM grantee_list opt_drop_behavior
    6991              :                                 {
    6992            0 :                                         GrantStmt *n = makeNode(GrantStmt);
    6993            0 :                                         n->is_grant = false;
    6994            0 :                                         n->grant_option = true;
    6995            0 :                                         n->privileges = $5;
    6996            0 :                                         n->targtype = ($7)->targtype;
    6997            0 :                                         n->objtype = ($7)->objtype;
    6998            0 :                                         n->objects = ($7)->objs;
    6999            0 :                                         n->grantees = $9;
    7000            0 :                                         n->behavior = $10;
    7001            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    7002              :                                 }
    7003              :                 ;
    7004              : 
    7005              : 
    7006              : /*
    7007              :  * Privilege names are represented as strings; the validity of the privilege
    7008              :  * names gets checked at execution.  This is a bit annoying but we have little
    7009              :  * choice because of the syntactic conflict with lists of role names in
    7010              :  * GRANT/REVOKE.  What's more, we have to call out in the "privilege"
    7011              :  * production any reserved keywords that need to be usable as privilege names.
    7012              :  */
    7013              : 
    7014              : /* either ALL [PRIVILEGES] or a list of individual privileges */
    7015              : privileges: privilege_list
    7016          109 :                                 { $$ = $1; }
    7017              :                         | ALL
    7018           12 :                                 { $$ = NIL; }
    7019              :                         | ALL PRIVILEGES
    7020            0 :                                 { $$ = NIL; }
    7021              :                         | ALL '(' columnList ')'
    7022              :                                 {
    7023            0 :                                         AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7024            0 :                                         n->priv_name = NULL;
    7025            0 :                                         n->cols = $3;
    7026            0 :                                         $$ = list_make1(n);
    7027              :                                 }
    7028              :                         | ALL PRIVILEGES '(' columnList ')'
    7029              :                                 {
    7030            0 :                                         AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7031            0 :                                         n->priv_name = NULL;
    7032            0 :                                         n->cols = $4;
    7033            0 :                                         $$ = list_make1(n);
    7034              :                                 }
    7035              :                 ;
    7036              : 
    7037          112 : privilege_list: privilege                                                       { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    7038            4 :                         | privilege_list ',' privilege                  { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    7039              :                 ;
    7040              : 
    7041              : privilege:      SELECT opt_column_list
    7042              :                         {
    7043           60 :                                 AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7044           60 :                                 n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
    7045           60 :                                 n->cols = $2;
    7046           60 :                                 $$ = n;
    7047              :                         }
    7048              :                 | REFERENCES opt_column_list
    7049              :                         {
    7050            0 :                                 AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7051            0 :                                 n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
    7052            0 :                                 n->cols = $2;
    7053            0 :                                 $$ = n;
    7054              :                         }
    7055              :                 | CREATE opt_column_list
    7056              :                         {
    7057            3 :                                 AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7058            3 :                                 n->priv_name = pstrdup($1);
    7059            3 :                                 n->cols = $2;
    7060            3 :                                 $$ = n;
    7061              :                         }
    7062              :                 | ColId opt_column_list
    7063              :                         {
    7064           53 :                                 AccessPriv *n = makeNode(AccessPriv);
    7065           53 :                                 n->priv_name = $1;
    7066           53 :                                 n->cols = $2;
    7067           53 :                                 $$ = n;
    7068              :                         }
    7069              :                 ;
    7070              : 
    7071              : 
    7072              : /* Don't bother trying to fold the first two rules into one using
    7073              :  * opt_table.  You're going to get conflicts.
    7074              :  */
    7075              : privilege_target:
    7076              :                         qualified_name_list
    7077              :                                 {
    7078           70 :                                         PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
    7079           70 :                                         n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
    7080           70 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_TABLE;
    7081           70 :                                         n->objs = $1;
    7082           70 :                                         $$ = n;
    7083              :                                 }
    7084              :                         | TABLE qualified_name_list
    7085              :                                 {

    7089            2 :                                         n->objs = $2;
    7090            2 :                                         $$ = n;
    7091              :                                 }
    7092              :                         | SEQUENCE qualified_name_list
    7093              :                                 {
    7094            0 :                                         PrivTarget *n = (PrivTarget *) palloc(sizeof(PrivTarget));
    7095            0 :                                         n->targtype = ACL_TARGET_OBJECT;
    7096            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_SEQUENCE;
    7097            0 :                                         n->objs = $2;
    7098            0 :                                         $$ = n;
    7099              :                                 }

    7113            0 :                                         n->objs = $3;
    7114            0 :                                         $$ = n;
    7115              :                                 }

    7520              : 
    7521              : /*
    7522              :  * Index attributes can be either simple column references, or arbitrary
    7523              :  * expressions in parens.  For backwards-compatibility reasons, we allow
    7524              :  * an expression that's just a function call to be written without parens.
    7525              :  */
    7526              : index_elem: ColId index_elem_options
    7527              :                                 {
    7528           23 :                                         $$ = $2;
    7529           23 :                                         $$->name = $1;
    7530              :                                 }
    7531              :                         | func_expr_windowless index_elem_options
    7532              :                                 {
    7533            0 :                                         $$ = $2;
    7534            0 :                                         $$->expr = $1;
    7535              :                                 }
    7536              :                         | '(' a_expr ')' index_elem_options
    7537              :                                 {
    7538            0 :                                         $$ = $4;
    7539            0 :                                         $$->expr = $2;
    7540              :                                 }
    7541              :                 ;

    7570              : /*****************************************************************************
    7571              :  *
    7572              :  *              QUERY:
    7573              :  *                              create [or replace] function <fname>
    7574              :  *                                              [(<type-1> { , <type-n>})]
    7575              :  *                                              returns <type-r>
    7576              :  *                                              as <filename or code in language as appropriate>
    7577              :  *                                              language <lang> [with parameters]
    7578              :  *
    7579              :  *****************************************************************************/
    7580              : 
    7581              : CreateFunctionStmt:
    7582              :                         CREATE opt_or_replace FUNCTION func_name func_args_with_defaults
    7583              :                         RETURNS func_return createfunc_opt_list
    7584              :                                 {
    7585           48 :                                         CreateFunctionStmt *n = makeNode(CreateFunctionStmt);
    7586           48 :                                         n->is_procedure = false;
    7587           48 :                                         n->replace = $2;
    7588           48 :                                         n->funcname = $4;
    7589           48 :                                         n->parameters = $5;
    7590           48 :                                         n->returnType = $7;
    7591           48 :                                         n->options = $8;
    7592           48 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    7593              :                                 }

    7661              :                         /*
    7662              :                          * Because of reduce/reduce conflicts, we can't use func_name
    7663              :                          * below, but we can write it out the long way, which actually
    7664              :                          * allows more cases.

    7666              :                         | type_func_name_keyword
    7667              :                                 {

    7669            0 :                                         n->objname = list_make1(makeString(pstrdup($1)));

    7671            0 :                                         $$ = n;
    7672              :                                 }
    7673              :                         | ColId

    7680              :                         | ColId indirection
