    7688              :                 ;
    7689              : 
    7690              : /*
    7691              :  * func_args_with_defaults is separate because we only want to accept
    7692              :  * defaults in CREATE FUNCTION, not in ALTER etc.
    7693              :  */
    7694              : func_args_with_defaults:
    7695           45 :                 '(' func_args_with_defaults_list ')'            { $$ = $2; }
    7696            3 :                 | '(' ')'                                                                       { $$ = NIL; }
    7697              :                 ;
    7698              : 
    7699              : func_args_with_defaults_list:
    7700           45 :                 func_arg_with_default                                           { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    7701              :                 | func_args_with_defaults_list ',' func_arg_with_default
    7702          120 :                                                                                                         { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    7703              :                 ;
    7704              : 
    7705              : /*
    7706              :  * The style with arg_class first is SQL99 standard, but Oracle puts
    7707              :  * param_name first; accept both since it's likely people will try both
    7708              :  * anyway.  Don't bother trying to save productions by letting arg_class
    7709              :  * have an empty alternative ... you'll get shift/reduce conflicts.
    7710              :  *
    7711              :  * We can catch over-specified arguments here if we want to,
    7712              :  * but for now better to silently swallow typmod, etc.
    7713              :  * - thomas 2000-03-22
    7714              :  */
    7715              : func_arg:
    7716              :                         arg_class param_name func_type
    7717              :                                 {
    7718           58 :                                         FunctionParameter *n = makeNode(FunctionParameter);
    7719           58 :                                         n->name = $2;
    7720           58 :                                         n->argType = $3;
    7721           58 :                                         n->mode = $1;
    7722           58 :                                         n->defexpr = NULL;
    7723           58 :                                         $$ = n;
    7724              :                                 }
    7725              :                         | param_name arg_class func_type
    7726              :                                 {
    7727            0 :                                         FunctionParameter *n = makeNode(FunctionParameter);
    7728            0 :                                         n->name = $1;
    7729            0 :                                         n->argType = $3;
    7730            0 :                                         n->mode = $2;
    7731            0 :                                         n->defexpr = NULL;
    7732            0 :                                         $$ = n;
    7733              :                                 }
    7734              :                         | param_name func_type
    7735              :                                 {
    7736           89 :                                         FunctionParameter *n = makeNode(FunctionParameter);
    7737           89 :                                         n->name = $1;
    7738           89 :                                         n->argType = $2;
    7739           89 :                                         n->mode = FUNC_PARAM_IN;
    7740           89 :                                         n->defexpr = NULL;
    7741           89 :                                         $$ = n;
    7742              :                                 }
    7743              :                         | arg_class func_type
    7744              :                                 {
    7745            1 :                                         FunctionParameter *n = makeNode(FunctionParameter);
    7746            1 :                                         n->name = NULL;
    7747            1 :                                         n->argType = $2;
    7748            1 :                                         n->mode = $1;
    7749            1 :                                         n->defexpr = NULL;

    7751              :                                 }
    7752              :                         | func_type

    7754           67 :                                         FunctionParameter *n = makeNode(FunctionParameter);
    7755           67 :                                         n->name = NULL;
    7756           67 :                                         n->argType = $1;
    7757           67 :                                         n->mode = FUNC_PARAM_IN;
    7758           67 :                                         n->defexpr = NULL;
    7759           67 :                                         $$ = n;
    7760              :                                 }
    7761              :                 ;
    7762              : 
    7763              : /* INOUT is SQL99 standard, IN OUT is for Oracle compatibility */
    7764           22 : arg_class:      IN_P                                                            { $$ = FUNC_PARAM_IN; }
    7765           33 :                         | OUT_P                                                         { $$ = FUNC_PARAM_OUT; }
    7766            0 :                         | INOUT                                                         { $$ = FUNC_PARAM_INOUT; }
    7767            0 :                         | IN_P OUT_P                                            { $$ = FUNC_PARAM_INOUT; }
    7768            4 :                         | VARIADIC                                                      { $$ = FUNC_PARAM_VARIADIC; }
    7769              :                 ;
    7770              : 
    7771              : /*
    7772              :  * Ideally param_name should be ColId, but that causes too many conflicts.
    7773              :  */
    7774              : param_name:     type_function_name
    7775              :                 ;
    7776              : 
    7777              : func_return:
    7778              :                         func_type
    7779              :                                 {
    7780              :                                         /* We can catch over-specified results here if we want to,
    7781              :                                          * but for now better to silently swallow typmod, etc.
    7782              :                                          * - thomas 2000-03-22
    7783              :                                          */
    7784           48 :                                         $$ = $1;
    7785              :                                 }
    7786              :                 ;
    7787              : 
    7788              : /*
    7789              :  * We would like to make the %TYPE productions here be ColId attrs etc,
    7790              :  * but that causes reduce/reduce conflicts.  type_function_name
    7791              :  * is next best choice.
    7792              :  */
    7793          324 : func_type:      Typename                                                                { $$ = $1; }
    7794              :                         | type_function_name attrs '%' TYPE_P
    7795              :                                 {
    7796            0 :                                         $$ = makeTypeNameFromNameList(lcons(makeString($1), $2));
    7797            0 :                                         $$->pct_type = true;
    7798            0 :                                         $$->location = @1;
    7799              :                                 }
    7800              :                         | SETOF type_function_name attrs '%' TYPE_P
    7801              :                                 {
    7802            0 :                                         $$ = makeTypeNameFromNameList(lcons(makeString($2), $3));
    7803            0 :                                         $$->pct_type = true;
    7804            0 :                                         $$->setof = true;
    7805            0 :                                         $$->location = @2;
    7806              :                                 }
    7807              :                 ;

    7809              : func_arg_with_default:
    7810              :                 func_arg
    7811              :                                 {
    7812          117 :                                         $$ = $1;
    7813              :                                 }
    7814              :                 | func_arg DEFAULT a_expr
    7815              :                                 {
    7816           48 :                                         $$ = $1;
    7817           48 :                                         $$->defexpr = $3;
    7818              :                                 }
    7819              :                 | func_arg '=' a_expr

    7821            0 :                                         $$ = $1;
    7822            0 :                                         $$->defexpr = $3;
    7823              :                                 }
    7824              :                 ;
    7825              : 
    7826              : /* Aggregate args can be most things that function args can be */
    7827              : aggr_arg:       func_arg
    7828              :                                 {
    7829            0 :                                         if (!($1->mode == FUNC_PARAM_IN ||
    7830            0 :                                                   $1->mode == FUNC_PARAM_VARIADIC))
    7831            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
    7832              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
    7833              :                                                                  errmsg("aggregates cannot have output arguments"),
    7834              :                                                                  parser_errposition(@1)));
    7835            0 :                                         $$ = $1;
    7836              :                                 }
    7837              :                 ;
    7838              : 
    7839              : /*
    7840              :  * The SQL standard offers no guidance on how to declare aggregate argument
    7841              :  * lists, since it doesn't have CREATE AGGREGATE etc.  We accept these cases:
    7842              :  *
    7843              :  * (*)                                                                  - normal agg with no args
    7844              :  * (aggr_arg,...)                                               - normal agg with args
    7845              :  * (ORDER BY aggr_arg,...)                              - ordered-set agg with no direct args
    7846              :  * (aggr_arg,... ORDER BY aggr_arg,...) - ordered-set agg with direct args
    7847              :  *
    7848              :  * The zero-argument case is spelled with '*' for consistency with COUNT(*).
    7849              :  *
    7850              :  * An additional restriction is that if the direct-args list ends in a
    7851              :  * VARIADIC item, the ordered-args list must contain exactly one item that
    7852              :  * is also VARIADIC with the same type.  This allows us to collapse the two
    7853              :  * VARIADIC items into one, which is necessary to represent the aggregate in
    7854              :  * pg_proc.  We check this at the grammar stage so that we can return a list
    7855              :  * in which the second VARIADIC item is already discarded, avoiding extra work
    7856              :  * in cases such as DROP AGGREGATE.
    7857              :  *
    7858              :  * The return value of this production is a two-element list, in which the
    7859              :  * first item is a sublist of FunctionParameter nodes (with any duplicate
    7860              :  * VARIADIC item already dropped, as per above) and the second is an integer
    7861              :  * Value node, containing -1 if there was no ORDER BY and otherwise the number
    7862              :  * of argument declarations before the ORDER BY.  (If this number is equal
    7863              :  * to the first sublist's length, then we dropped a duplicate VARIADIC item.)
    7864              :  * This representation is passed as-is to CREATE AGGREGATE; for operations
    7865              :  * on existing aggregates, we can just apply extractArgTypes to the first
    7866              :  * sublist.
    7867              :  */
    7868              : aggr_args:      '(' '*' ')'
    7869              :                                 {
    7870            0 :                                         $$ = list_make2(NIL, makeInteger(-1));
    7871              :                                 }
    7872              :                         | '(' aggr_args_list ')'
    7873              :                                 {
    7874            0 :                                         $$ = list_make2($2, makeInteger(-1));
    7875              :                                 }
    7876              :                         | '(' ORDER BY aggr_args_list ')'
    7877              :                                 {
    7878            0 :                                         $$ = list_make2($4, makeInteger(0));
    7879              :                                 }
    7880              :                         | '(' aggr_args_list ORDER BY aggr_args_list ')'
    7881              :                                 {
    7882              :                                         /* this is the only case requiring consistency checking */
    7883            0 :                                         $$ = makeOrderedSetArgs($2, $5, yyscanner);
    7884              :                                 }
    7885              :                 ;
    7886              : 
    7887              : aggr_args_list:
    7888            0 :                         aggr_arg                                                                { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    7889            0 :                         | aggr_args_list ',' aggr_arg                   { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    7890              :                 ;
    7891              : 
    7892              : aggregate_with_argtypes:
    7893              :                         func_name aggr_args
    7894              :                                 {
    7895            0 :                                         ObjectWithArgs *n = makeNode(ObjectWithArgs);
    7896            0 :                                         n->objname = $1;
    7897            0 :                                         n->objargs = extractAggrArgTypes($2);
    7898            0 :                                         $$ = n;
    7899              :                                 }
    7900              :                 ;
    7901              : 
    7902              : aggregate_with_argtypes_list:
    7903            0 :                         aggregate_with_argtypes                                 { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    7904              :                         | aggregate_with_argtypes_list ',' aggregate_with_argtypes
    7905            0 :                                                                                                         { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    7906              :                 ;
    7907              : 
    7908              : createfunc_opt_list:
    7909              :                         /* Must be at least one to prevent conflict */
    7910           48 :                         createfunc_opt_item                                             { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    7911          171 :                         | createfunc_opt_list createfunc_opt_item { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
    7912              :         ;

    7922              :                         | RETURNS NULL_P ON NULL_P INPUT_P
    7923              :                                 {

    7930              :                         | IMMUTABLE
    7931              :                                 {

    7933              :                                 }
    7934              :                         | STABLE
    7935              :                                 {
    7936           10 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("volatility", (Node *)makeString("stable"), @1);
    7937              :                                 }
    7938              :                         | VOLATILE

    7940            9 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("volatility", (Node *)makeString("volatile"), @1);
    7941              :                                 }
    7942              :                         | EXTERNAL SECURITY DEFINER

    7950              :                         | SECURITY DEFINER

    7953              :                                 }
    7954              :                         | SECURITY INVOKER
    7955              :                                 {
    7956            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("security", (Node *)makeInteger(false), @1);
    7957              :                                 }
    7958              :                         | LEAKPROOF
    7959              :                                 {
    7960            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("leakproof", (Node *)makeInteger(true), @1);
    7961              :                                 }
    7962              :                         | NOT LEAKPROOF
    7963              :                                 {
    7964            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("leakproof", (Node *)makeInteger(false), @1);
    7965              :                                 }
    7966              :                         | COST NumericOnly
    7967              :                                 {
    7968            4 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem("cost", (Node *)$2, @1);
    7969              :                                 }
    7970              :                         | ROWS NumericOnly
    7971              :                                 {

    7974              :                         | SUPPORT any_name

    7977              :                                 }
    7978              :                         | FunctionSetResetClause

    8051              : /*****************************************************************************
    8052              :  * ALTER FUNCTION / ALTER PROCEDURE / ALTER ROUTINE
    8053              :  *
    8054              :  * RENAME and OWNER subcommands are already provided by the generic
    8055              :  * ALTER infrastructure, here we just specify alterations that can
    8056              :  * only be applied to functions.
    8057              :  *
    8058              :  *****************************************************************************/
    8059              : AlterFunctionStmt:
    8060              :                         ALTER FUNCTION function_with_argtypes alterfunc_opt_list opt_restrict
    8061              :                                 {
    8062            0 :                                         AlterFunctionStmt *n = makeNode(AlterFunctionStmt);
    8063            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_FUNCTION;
    8064            0 :                                         n->func = $3;
    8065            0 :                                         n->actions = $4;
    8066            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    8067              :                                 }
    8068              :                         | ALTER PROCEDURE function_with_argtypes alterfunc_opt_list opt_restrict

    8075              :                                 }

    8079            0 :                                         n->objtype = OBJECT_ROUTINE;
    8080            0 :                                         n->func = $3;
    8081            0 :                                         n->actions = $4;
    8082            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    8083              :                                 }
    8084              :                 ;
    8085              : 
    8086              : alterfunc_opt_list:
    8087              :                         /* At least one option must be specified */
    8088            0 :                         common_func_opt_item                                    { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    8089            0 :                         | alterfunc_opt_list common_func_opt_item { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
    8090              :                 ;
    8091              : 
    8092              : /* Ignored, merely for SQL compliance */
    8093              : opt_restrict:
    8094              :                         RESTRICT
    8095              :                         | /* EMPTY */
    8096              :                 ;

    8098              : 
    8099              : /*****************************************************************************
    8100              :  *
    8101              :  *              QUERY:
    8102              :  *
    8103              :  *              DROP FUNCTION funcname (arg1, arg2, ...) [ RESTRICT | CASCADE ]

    8108              :  *
    8109              :  *****************************************************************************/

    9365              : 
    9366              : /*****************************************************************************
    9367              :  *
    9368              :  * ALTER OPERATOR name SET define
    9369              :  *
    9370              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9371              : 
    9372              : AlterOperatorStmt:
    9373              :                         ALTER OPERATOR operator_with_argtypes SET '(' operator_def_list ')'
    9374              :                                 {
    9375            0 :                                         AlterOperatorStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOperatorStmt);
    9376            0 :                                         n->opername = $3;
    9377            0 :                                         n->options = $6;
    9378            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9379              :                                 }
    9380              :                 ;
    9381              : 
    9382            0 : operator_def_list:      operator_def_elem                                                               { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    9383            0 :                         | operator_def_list ',' operator_def_elem                               { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
    9384              :                 ;
    9385              : 
    9386              : operator_def_elem: ColLabel '=' NONE
    9387            0 :                                                 { $$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1); }
    9388              :                                    | ColLabel '=' operator_def_arg
    9389            0 :                                                 { $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *) $3, @1); }
    9390              :                 ;
    9391              : 
    9392              : /* must be similar enough to def_arg to avoid reduce/reduce conflicts */
    9393              : operator_def_arg:
    9394            0 :                         func_type                                               { $$ = (Node *)$1; }
    9395            0 :                         | reserved_keyword                              { $$ = (Node *)makeString(pstrdup($1)); }
    9396            0 :                         | qual_all_Op                                   { $$ = (Node *)$1; }
    9397            0 :                         | NumericOnly                                   { $$ = (Node *)$1; }
    9398            0 :                         | Sconst                                                { $$ = (Node *)makeString($1); }
    9399              :                 ;
    9400              : 
    9401              : /*****************************************************************************
    9402              :  *
    9403              :  * ALTER TYPE name SET define
    9404              :  *
    9405              :  * We repurpose ALTER OPERATOR's version of "definition" here
    9406              :  *
    9407              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9408              : 
    9409              : AlterTypeStmt:
    9410              :                         ALTER TYPE_P any_name SET '(' operator_def_list ')'
    9411              :                                 {
    9412            0 :                                         AlterTypeStmt *n = makeNode(AlterTypeStmt);
    9413            0 :                                         n->typeName = $3;
    9414            0 :                                         n->options = $6;
    9415            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9416              :                                 }
    9417              :                 ;

    9584              :                                 }
    9585              :                         | ALTER SERVER name OWNER TO RoleSpec
    9586              :                                 {
    9587            0 :                                         AlterOwnerStmt *n = makeNode(AlterOwnerStmt);
    9588            0 :                                         n->objectType = OBJECT_FOREIGN_SERVER;
    9589            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) makeString($3);
    9590            0 :                                         n->newowner = $6;
    9591            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9592              :                                 }

    9594              :                                 {

    9597            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) makeString($4);
    9598            0 :                                         n->newowner = $7;
    9599            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9600              :                                 }
    9601              :                         | ALTER PUBLICATION name OWNER TO RoleSpec
    9602              :                                 {

    9605            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) makeString($3);
    9606            0 :                                         n->newowner = $6;
    9607            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9608              :                                 }

    9610              :                                 {

    9613            0 :                                         n->object = (Node *) makeString($3);
    9614            0 :                                         n->newowner = $6;
    9615            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9616              :                                 }
    9617              :                 ;
    9618              : 
    9619              : 
    9620              : /*****************************************************************************
    9621              :  *
    9622              :  * CREATE PUBLICATION name [ FOR TABLE ] [ WITH options ]
    9623              :  *
    9624              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9625              : 
    9626              : CreatePublicationStmt:
    9627              :                         CREATE PUBLICATION name opt_publication_for_tables opt_definition
    9628              :                                 {
    9629            0 :                                         CreatePublicationStmt *n = makeNode(CreatePublicationStmt);
    9630            0 :                                         n->pubname = $3;
    9631            0 :                                         n->options = $5;
    9632            0 :                                         if ($4 != NULL)
    9633              :                                         {
    9634              :                                                 /* FOR TABLE */
    9635            0 :                                                 if (IsA($4, List))
    9636            0 :                                                         n->tables = (List *)$4;
    9637              :                                                 /* FOR ALL TABLES */
    9638              :                                                 else
    9639            0 :                                                         n->for_all_tables = true;
    9640              :                                         }
    9641            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9642              :                                 }
    9643              :                 ;
    9644              : 
    9645              : opt_publication_for_tables:
    9646            0 :                         publication_for_tables                                  { $$ = $1; }
    9647            0 :                         | /* EMPTY */                                                   { $$ = NULL; }
    9648              :                 ;
    9649              : 
    9650              : publication_for_tables:
    9651              :                         FOR TABLE relation_expr_list
    9652              :                                 {
    9653            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) $3;
    9654              :                                 }
    9655              :                         | FOR ALL TABLES
    9656              :                                 {
    9657            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) makeInteger(true);
    9658              :                                 }
    9659              :                 ;
    9660              : 
    9661              : 
    9662              : /*****************************************************************************
    9663              :  *
    9664              :  * ALTER PUBLICATION name SET ( options )
    9665              :  *
    9666              :  * ALTER PUBLICATION name ADD TABLE table [, table2]
    9667              :  *
    9668              :  * ALTER PUBLICATION name DROP TABLE table [, table2]
    9669              :  *
    9670              :  * ALTER PUBLICATION name SET TABLE table [, table2]
    9671              :  *
    9672              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9673              : 
    9674              : AlterPublicationStmt:
    9675              :                         ALTER PUBLICATION name SET definition
    9676              :                                 {
    9677            0 :                                         AlterPublicationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterPublicationStmt);
    9678            0 :                                         n->pubname = $3;
    9679            0 :                                         n->options = $5;
    9680            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9681              :                                 }
    9682              :                         | ALTER PUBLICATION name ADD_P TABLE relation_expr_list
    9683              :                                 {
    9684            0 :                                         AlterPublicationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterPublicationStmt);
    9685            0 :                                         n->pubname = $3;
    9686            0 :                                         n->tables = $6;
    9687            0 :                                         n->tableAction = DEFELEM_ADD;
    9688            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9689              :                                 }
    9690              :                         | ALTER PUBLICATION name SET TABLE relation_expr_list
    9691              :                                 {
    9692            0 :                                         AlterPublicationStmt *n = makeNode(AlterPublicationStmt);
    9693            0 :                                         n->pubname = $3;
    9694            0 :                                         n->tables = $6;
    9695            0 :                                         n->tableAction = DEFELEM_SET;
    9696            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9697              :                                 }
    9698              :                         | ALTER PUBLICATION name DROP TABLE relation_expr_list
    9699              :                                 {

    9701            0 :                                         n->pubname = $3;
    9702            0 :                                         n->tables = $6;

    9707              : 
    9708              : /*****************************************************************************
    9709              :  *
    9710              :  * CREATE SUBSCRIPTION name ...
    9711              :  *
    9712              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9713              : 
    9714              : CreateSubscriptionStmt:
    9715              :                         CREATE SUBSCRIPTION name CONNECTION Sconst PUBLICATION publication_name_list opt_definition
    9716              :                                 {
    9717            0 :                                         CreateSubscriptionStmt *n =
    9718            0 :                                                 makeNode(CreateSubscriptionStmt);
    9719            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9720            0 :                                         n->conninfo = $5;
    9721            0 :                                         n->publication = $7;
    9722            0 :                                         n->options = $8;
    9723            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9724              :                                 }
    9725              :                 ;
    9726              : 
    9727              : publication_name_list:
    9728              :                         publication_name_item
    9729              :                                 {
    9730            0 :                                         $$ = list_make1($1);
    9731              :                                 }
    9732              :                         | publication_name_list ',' publication_name_item
    9733              :                                 {
    9734            0 :                                         $$ = lappend($1, $3);
    9735              :                                 }
    9736              :                 ;
    9737              : 
    9738              : publication_name_item:
    9739            0 :                         ColLabel                        { $$ = makeString($1); };
    9740              : 
    9741              : /*****************************************************************************
    9742              :  *
    9743              :  * ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name ...
    9744              :  *
    9745              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9746              : 
    9747              : AlterSubscriptionStmt:
    9748              :                         ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name SET definition
    9749              :                                 {
    9750            0 :                                         AlterSubscriptionStmt *n =
    9751            0 :                                                 makeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);
    9752            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_OPTIONS;
    9753            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9754            0 :                                         n->options = $5;
    9755            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9756              :                                 }
    9757              :                         | ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name CONNECTION Sconst
    9758              :                                 {
    9759            0 :                                         AlterSubscriptionStmt *n =
    9760            0 :                                                 makeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);
    9761            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_CONNECTION;
    9762            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9763            0 :                                         n->conninfo = $5;
    9764            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9765              :                                 }

    9767              :                                 {
    9768            0 :                                         AlterSubscriptionStmt *n =
    9769            0 :                                                 makeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);
    9770            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_REFRESH;
    9771            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9772            0 :                                         n->options = $6;
    9773            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9774              :                                 }
    9775              :                         | ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name SET PUBLICATION publication_name_list opt_definition
    9776              :                                 {

    9779            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_PUBLICATION;
    9780            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9781            0 :                                         n->publication = $6;
    9782            0 :                                         n->options = $7;
    9783            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9784              :                                 }
    9785              :                         | ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name ENABLE_P
    9786              :                                 {
    9787            0 :                                         AlterSubscriptionStmt *n =

    9789            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ENABLED;
    9790            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9791            0 :                                         n->options = list_make1(makeDefElem("enabled",
    9792              :                                                                                         (Node *)makeInteger(true), @1));
    9793            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9794              :                                 }
    9795              :                         | ALTER SUBSCRIPTION name DISABLE_P
    9796              :                                 {
    9797            0 :                                         AlterSubscriptionStmt *n =
    9798            0 :                                                 makeNode(AlterSubscriptionStmt);
    9799            0 :                                         n->kind = ALTER_SUBSCRIPTION_ENABLED;
    9800            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9801            0 :                                         n->options = list_make1(makeDefElem("enabled",
    9802              :                                                                                         (Node *)makeInteger(false), @1));
    9803            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9804              :                                 }

    9806              : 
    9807              : /*****************************************************************************
    9808              :  *
    9809              :  * DROP SUBSCRIPTION [ IF EXISTS ] name
    9810              :  *
    9811              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9812              : 
    9813              : DropSubscriptionStmt: DROP SUBSCRIPTION name opt_drop_behavior
    9814              :                                 {
    9815            0 :                                         DropSubscriptionStmt *n = makeNode(DropSubscriptionStmt);
    9816            0 :                                         n->subname = $3;
    9817            0 :                                         n->missing_ok = false;
    9818            0 :                                         n->behavior = $4;
    9819            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    9820              :                                 }
    9821              :                                 |  DROP SUBSCRIPTION IF_P EXISTS name opt_drop_behavior
    9822              :                                 {
    9823            0 :                                         DropSubscriptionStmt *n = makeNode(DropSubscriptionStmt);
    9824            0 :                                         n->subname = $5;
    9825            0 :                                         n->missing_ok = true;
    9826            0 :                                         n->behavior = $6;
    9827            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
    9828              :                                 }
    9829              :                 ;
    9830              : 
    9831              : /*****************************************************************************
    9832              :  *
    9833              :  *              QUERY:  Define Rewrite Rule
    9834              :  *
    9835              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9836              : 
    9837              : RuleStmt:       CREATE opt_or_replace RULE name AS
    9838              :                         ON event TO qualified_name where_clause
    9839              :                         DO opt_instead RuleActionList
    9840              :                                 {
    9841           13 :                                         RuleStmt *n = makeNode(RuleStmt);
    9842           13 :                                         n->replace = $2;
    9843           13 :                                         n->relation = $9;
    9844           13 :                                         n->rulename = $4;
    9845           13 :                                         n->whereClause = $10;
    9846           13 :                                         n->event = $7;
    9847           13 :                                         n->instead = $12;
    9848           13 :                                         n->actions = $13;
    9849           13 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9850              :                                 }
    9851              :                 ;
    9852              : 
    9853              : RuleActionList:
    9854            3 :                         NOTHING                                                                 { $$ = NIL; }
    9855           10 :                         | RuleActionStmt                                                { $$ = list_make1($1); }
    9856            0 :                         | '(' RuleActionMulti ')'                               { $$ = $2; }
    9857              :                 ;
    9858              : 
    9859              : /* the thrashing around here is to discard "empty" statements... */
    9860              : RuleActionMulti:
    9861              :                         RuleActionMulti ';' RuleActionStmtOrEmpty
    9862            0 :                                 { if ($3 != NULL)
    9863            0 :                                         $$ = lappend($1, $3);
    9864              :                                   else
    9865            0 :                                         $$ = $1;
    9866              :                                 }
    9867              :                         | RuleActionStmtOrEmpty
    9868            0 :                                 { if ($1 != NULL)
    9869            0 :                                         $$ = list_make1($1);
    9870              :                                   else
    9871            0 :                                         $$ = NIL;
    9872              :                                 }
    9873              :                 ;
    9874              : 
    9875              : RuleActionStmt:
    9876              :                         SelectStmt
    9877              :                         | InsertStmt
    9878              :                         | UpdateStmt
    9879              :                         | DeleteStmt
    9880              :                         | NotifyStmt
    9881              :                 ;
    9882              : 
    9883              : RuleActionStmtOrEmpty:
    9884            0 :                         RuleActionStmt                                                  { $$ = $1; }
    9885            0 :                         |       /*EMPTY*/                                                       { $$ = NULL; }
    9886              :                 ;
    9887              : 
    9888            0 : event:          SELECT                                                                  { $$ = CMD_SELECT; }
    9889            3 :                         | UPDATE                                                                { $$ = CMD_UPDATE; }
    9890            1 :                         | DELETE_P                                                              { $$ = CMD_DELETE; }
    9891            9 :                         | INSERT                                                                { $$ = CMD_INSERT; }
    9892              :                  ;
    9893              : 
    9894              : opt_instead:
    9895            6 :                         INSTEAD                                                                 { $$ = true; }
    9896            6 :                         | ALSO                                                                  { $$ = false; }
    9897            1 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             { $$ = false; }
    9898              :                 ;
    9899              : 
    9900              : 
    9901              : /*****************************************************************************
    9902              :  *
    9903              :  *              QUERY:
    9904              :  *                              NOTIFY <identifier> can appear both in rule bodies and
    9905              :  *                              as a query-level command
    9906              :  *
    9907              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9908              : 
    9909              : NotifyStmt: NOTIFY ColId notify_payload
    9910              :                                 {
    9911            0 :                                         NotifyStmt *n = makeNode(NotifyStmt);
    9912            0 :                                         n->conditionname = $2;
    9913            0 :                                         n->payload = $3;
    9914            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9915              :                                 }
    9916              :                 ;
    9917              : 
    9918              : notify_payload:
    9919            0 :                         ',' Sconst                                                      { $$ = $2; }
    9920            0 :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                     { $$ = NULL; }
    9921              :                 ;
    9922              : 
    9923              : ListenStmt: LISTEN ColId
    9924              :                                 {
    9925            0 :                                         ListenStmt *n = makeNode(ListenStmt);
    9926            0 :                                         n->conditionname = $2;
    9927            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9928              :                                 }
    9929              :                 ;
    9930              : 
    9931              : UnlistenStmt:
    9932              :                         UNLISTEN ColId
    9933              :                                 {
    9934            0 :                                         UnlistenStmt *n = makeNode(UnlistenStmt);
    9935            0 :                                         n->conditionname = $2;
    9936            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9937              :                                 }
    9938              :                         | UNLISTEN '*'
    9939              :                                 {
    9940            0 :                                         UnlistenStmt *n = makeNode(UnlistenStmt);
    9941            0 :                                         n->conditionname = NULL;
    9942            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9943              :                                 }
    9944              :                 ;
    9945              : 
    9946              : 
    9947              : /*****************************************************************************
    9948              :  *
    9949              :  *              Transactions:
    9950              :  *
    9951              :  *              BEGIN / COMMIT / ROLLBACK
    9952              :  *              (also older versions END / ABORT)
    9953              :  *
    9954              :  *****************************************************************************/
    9955              : 
    9956              : TransactionStmt:
    9957              :                         ABORT_P opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain
    9958              :                                 {
    9959            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9960            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK;
    9961            0 :                                         n->options = NIL;
    9962            0 :                                         n->chain = $3;
    9963            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9964              :                                 }
    9965              :                         | BEGIN_P opt_transaction transaction_mode_list_or_empty
    9966              :                                 {
    9967           20 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9968           20 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_BEGIN;
    9969           20 :                                         n->options = $3;
    9970           20 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9971              :                                 }
    9972              :                         | START TRANSACTION transaction_mode_list_or_empty
    9973              :                                 {
    9974            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9975            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_START;
    9976            0 :                                         n->options = $3;
    9977            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9978              :                                 }
    9979              :                         | COMMIT opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain
    9980              :                                 {
    9981           20 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9982           20 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT;
    9983           20 :                                         n->options = NIL;
    9984           20 :                                         n->chain = $3;
    9985           20 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9986              :                                 }
    9987              :                         | END_P opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain
    9988              :                                 {
    9989            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9990            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT;
    9991            0 :                                         n->options = NIL;
    9992            0 :                                         n->chain = $3;
    9993            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
    9994              :                                 }
    9995              :                         | ROLLBACK opt_transaction opt_transaction_chain
    9996              :                                 {
    9997            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
    9998            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK;
    9999            0 :                                         n->options = NIL;
   10000            0 :                                         n->chain = $3;
   10001            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10002              :                                 }
   10003              :                         | SAVEPOINT ColId
   10004              :                                 {
   10005            7 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10006            7 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_SAVEPOINT;
   10007            7 :                                         n->savepoint_name = $2;
   10008            7 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10009              :                                 }
   10010              :                         | RELEASE SAVEPOINT ColId
   10011              :                                 {
   10012            5 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10013            5 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_RELEASE;
   10014            5 :                                         n->savepoint_name = $3;
   10015            5 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10016              :                                 }
   10017              :                         | RELEASE ColId
   10018              :                                 {
   10019            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10020            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_RELEASE;
   10021            0 :                                         n->savepoint_name = $2;
   10022            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10023              :                                 }
   10024              :                         | ROLLBACK opt_transaction TO SAVEPOINT ColId
   10025              :                                 {
   10026            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10027            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_TO;
   10028            0 :                                         n->savepoint_name = $5;
   10029            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10030              :                                 }
   10031              :                         | ROLLBACK opt_transaction TO ColId
   10032              :                                 {
   10033            2 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10034            2 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_TO;
   10035            2 :                                         n->savepoint_name = $4;
   10036            2 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10037              :                                 }
   10038              :                         | PREPARE TRANSACTION Sconst
   10039              :                                 {
   10040            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10041            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_PREPARE;
   10042            0 :                                         n->gid = $3;
   10043            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10044              :                                 }
   10045              :                         | COMMIT PREPARED Sconst
   10046              :                                 {
   10047            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10048            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_COMMIT_PREPARED;
   10049            0 :                                         n->gid = $3;
   10050            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10051              :                                 }
   10052              :                         | ROLLBACK PREPARED Sconst
   10053              :                                 {
   10054            0 :                                         TransactionStmt *n = makeNode(TransactionStmt);
   10055            0 :                                         n->kind = TRANS_STMT_ROLLBACK_PREPARED;
   10056            0 :                                         n->gid = $3;
   10057            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10058              :                                 }
   10059              :                 ;
   10060              : 
   10061              : opt_transaction:        WORK                                                    {}
   10062              :                         | TRANSACTION                                                   {}
   10063              :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             {}
   10064              :                 ;
   10065              : 
   10066              : transaction_mode_item:
   10067              :                         ISOLATION LEVEL iso_level
   10068            1 :                                         { $$ = makeDefElem("transaction_isolation",
   10069            1 :                                                                            makeStringConst($3, @3), @1); }
   10070              :                         | READ ONLY
   10071            0 :                                         { $$ = makeDefElem("transaction_read_only",
   10072            0 :                                                                            makeIntConst(true, @1), @1); }
   10073              :                         | READ WRITE
   10074            0 :                                         { $$ = makeDefElem("transaction_read_only",
   10075            0 :                                                                            makeIntConst(false, @1), @1); }
   10076              :                         | DEFERRABLE
   10077            0 :                                         { $$ = makeDefElem("transaction_deferrable",
   10078              :                                                                            makeIntConst(true, @1), @1); }
   10079              :                         | NOT DEFERRABLE
   10080            0 :                                         { $$ = makeDefElem("transaction_deferrable",
   10081            0 :                                                                            makeIntConst(false, @1), @1); }
   10082              :                 ;
   10083              : 
   10084              : /* Syntax with commas is SQL-spec, without commas is Postgres historical */
   10085              : transaction_mode_list:
   10086              :                         transaction_mode_item
   10087            1 :                                         { $$ = list_make1($1); }
   10088              :                         | transaction_mode_list ',' transaction_mode_item
   10089            0 :                                         { $$ = lappend($1, $3); }
   10090              :                         | transaction_mode_list transaction_mode_item
   10091            0 :                                         { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
   10092              :                 ;
   10093              : 
   10094              : transaction_mode_list_or_empty:
   10095              :                         transaction_mode_list
   10096              :                         | /* EMPTY */
   10097           19 :                                         { $$ = NIL; }
   10098              :                 ;
   10099              : 
   10100              : opt_transaction_chain:
   10101            0 :                         AND CHAIN               { $$ = true; }
   10102            0 :                         | AND NO CHAIN  { $$ = false; }
   10103           20 :                         | /* EMPTY */   { $$ = false; }
   10104              :                 ;
   10105              : 
   10106              : 
   10107              : /*****************************************************************************
   10108              :  *
   10109              :  *      QUERY:
   10110              :  *              CREATE [ OR REPLACE ] [ TEMP ] VIEW <viewname> '('target-list ')'
   10111              :  *                      AS <query> [ WITH [ CASCADED | LOCAL ] CHECK OPTION ]
   10112              :  *
   10113              :  *****************************************************************************/
   10114              : 
   10115              : ViewStmt: CREATE OptTemp VIEW qualified_name opt_column_list opt_reloptions
   10116              :                                 AS SelectStmt opt_check_option
   10117              :                                 {
   10118          145 :                                         ViewStmt *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);
   10119          145 :                                         n->view = $4;
   10120          145 :                                         n->view->relpersistence = $2;
   10121          145 :                                         n->aliases = $5;
   10122          145 :                                         n->query = $8;
   10123          145 :                                         n->replace = false;
   10124          145 :                                         n->options = $6;
   10125          145 :                                         n->withCheckOption = $9;
   10126          145 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
   10127              :                                 }
   10128              :                 | CREATE OR REPLACE OptTemp VIEW qualified_name opt_column_list opt_reloptions
   10129              :                                 AS SelectStmt opt_check_option
   10130              :                                 {
   10131            1 :                                         ViewStmt *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);
   10132            1 :                                         n->view = $6;
   10133            1 :                                         n->view->relpersistence = $4;
   10134            1 :                                         n->aliases = $7;
   10135            1 :                                         n->query = $10;
   10136            1 :                                         n->replace = true;
   10137            1 :                                         n->options = $8;
   10138            1 :                                         n->withCheckOption = $11;
   10139            1 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
   10140              :                                 }
   10141              :                 | CREATE OptTemp RECURSIVE VIEW qualified_name '(' columnList ')' opt_reloptions
   10142              :                                 AS SelectStmt opt_check_option
   10143              :                                 {
   10144            0 :                                         ViewStmt *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);
   10145            0 :                                         n->view = $5;
   10146            0 :                                         n->view->relpersistence = $2;
   10147            0 :                                         n->aliases = $7;
   10148            0 :                                         n->query = makeRecursiveViewSelect(n->view->relname, n->aliases, $11);
   10149            0 :                                         n->replace = false;
   10150            0 :                                         n->options = $9;
   10151            0 :                                         n->withCheckOption = $12;
   10152            0 :                                         if (n->withCheckOption != NO_CHECK_OPTION)
   10153            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
   10154              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
   10155              :                                                                  errmsg("WITH CHECK OPTION not supported on recursive views"),
   10156              :                                                                  parser_errposition(@12)));
   10157            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
   10158              :                                 }
   10159              :                 | CREATE OR REPLACE OptTemp RECURSIVE VIEW qualified_name '(' columnList ')' opt_reloptions
   10160              :                                 AS SelectStmt opt_check_option
   10161              :                                 {
   10162            0 :                                         ViewStmt *n = makeNode(ViewStmt);
   10163            0 :                                         n->view = $7;
   10164            0 :                                         n->view->relpersistence = $4;
   10165            0 :                                         n->aliases = $9;
   10166            0 :                                         n->query = makeRecursiveViewSelect(n->view->relname, n->aliases, $13);
   10167            0 :                                         n->replace = true;
   10168            0 :                                         n->options = $11;
   10169            0 :                                         n->withCheckOption = $14;
   10170            0 :                                         if (n->withCheckOption != NO_CHECK_OPTION)
   10171            0 :                                                 ereport(ERROR,
   10172              :                                                                 (errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
   10173              :                                                                  errmsg("WITH CHECK OPTION not supported on recursive views"),
   10174              :                                                                  parser_errposition(@14)));
   10175            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *) n;
   10176              :                                 }
   10177              :                 ;
   10178              : 
   10179              : opt_check_option:
   10180            0 :                 WITH CHECK OPTION                               { $$ = CASCADED_CHECK_OPTION; }
   10181            0 :                 | WITH CASCADED CHECK OPTION    { $$ = CASCADED_CHECK_OPTION; }
   10182            0 :                 | WITH LOCAL CHECK OPTION               { $$ = LOCAL_CHECK_OPTION; }
   10183          146 :                 | /* EMPTY */                                   { $$ = NO_CHECK_OPTION; }
   10184              :                 ;
   10185              : 
   10186              : /*****************************************************************************
   10187              :  *
   10188              :  *              QUERY:
   10189              :  *                              LOAD "filename"
   10190              :  *
   10191              :  *****************************************************************************/
   10192              : 
   10193              : LoadStmt:       LOAD file_name
   10194              :                                 {
   10195            0 :                                         LoadStmt *n = makeNode(LoadStmt);
   10196            0 :                                         n->filename = $2;
   10197            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10198              :                                 }

   10201              : 
   10202              : /*****************************************************************************
   10203              :  *
   10204              :  *              CREATE DATABASE
   10205              :  *
   10206              :  *****************************************************************************/
   10207              : 
   10208              : CreatedbStmt:
   10209              :                         CREATE DATABASE database_name opt_with createdb_opt_list
   10210              :                                 {
   10211            3 :                                         CreatedbStmt *n = makeNode(CreatedbStmt);
   10212            3 :                                         n->dbname = $3;
   10213            3 :                                         n->options = $5;
   10214            3 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10215              :                                 }
   10216              :                 ;
   10217              : 
   10218              : createdb_opt_list:
   10219            1 :                         createdb_opt_items                                              { $$ = $1; }
   10220            2 :                         | /* EMPTY */                                                   { $$ = NIL; }
   10221              :                 ;
   10222              : 
   10223              : createdb_opt_items:
   10224            1 :                         createdb_opt_item                                               { $$ = list_make1($1); }
   10225            1 :                         | createdb_opt_items createdb_opt_item  { $$ = lappend($1, $2); }
   10226              :                 ;
   10227              : 
   10228              : createdb_opt_item:
   10229              :                         createdb_opt_name opt_equal SignedIconst
   10230              :                                 {
   10231            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *)makeInteger($3), @1);
   10232              :                                 }
   10233              :                         | createdb_opt_name opt_equal opt_boolean_or_string
   10234              :                                 {
   10235            2 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem($1, (Node *)makeString($3), @1);
   10236              :                                 }
   10237              :                         | createdb_opt_name opt_equal DEFAULT
   10238              :                                 {
   10239            0 :                                         $$ = makeDefElem($1, NULL, @1);
   10240              :                                 }
   10241              :                 ;
   10242              : 
   10243              : /*
   10244              :  * Ideally we'd use ColId here, but that causes shift/reduce conflicts against
   10245              :  * the ALTER DATABASE SET/RESET syntaxes.  Instead call out specific keywords
   10246              :  * we need, and allow IDENT so that database option names don't have to be
   10247              :  * parser keywords unless they are already keywords for other reasons.
   10248              :  *
   10249              :  * XXX this coding technique is fragile since if someone makes a formerly
   10250              :  * non-keyword option name into a keyword and forgets to add it here, the
   10251              :  * option will silently break.  Best defense is to provide a regression test
   10252              :  * exercising every such option, at least at the syntax level.
   10253              :  */
   10254              : createdb_opt_name:
   10255            2 :                         IDENT                                                   { $$ = $1; }
   10256            0 :                         | CONNECTION LIMIT                              { $$ = pstrdup("connection_limit"); }
   10257            0 :                         | ENCODING                                              { $$ = pstrdup($1); }
   10258            0 :                         | LOCATION                                              { $$ = pstrdup($1); }
   10259            0 :                         | OWNER                                                 { $$ = pstrdup($1); }
   10260            0 :                         | TABLESPACE                                    { $$ = pstrdup($1); }
   10261            0 :                         | TEMPLATE                                              { $$ = pstrdup($1); }
   10262              :                 ;
   10263              : 
   10264              : /*
   10265              :  *      Though the equals sign doesn't match other WITH options, pg_dump uses
   10266              :  *      equals for backward compatibility, and it doesn't seem worth removing it.
   10267              :  */
   10268              : opt_equal:      '='                                                                             {}
   10269              :                         | /*EMPTY*/                                                             {}
   10270              :                 ;
   10271              : 
   10272              : 
   10273              : /*****************************************************************************
   10274              :  *
   10275              :  *              ALTER DATABASE
   10276              :  *
   10277              :  *****************************************************************************/
   10278              :

   10281              :                                  {

   10283            0 :                                         n->dbname = $3;
   10284            0 :                                         n->options = $5;
   10285            0 :                                         $$ = (Node *)n;
   10286              :                                  }
